message:
fix(ftui-extras): resolve GPU test lock race between metaballs and gpu modules (bd-1krj1)

The visual_fx::gpu::tests and visual_fx::effects::metaballs::tests both
manipulate GPU global state (GPU_BACKEND) but used separate Mutex locks.
When running the full test suite in parallel, gpu::tests could reset state
while metaballs tests were mid-execution, causing assertion failures and
lock poisoning.

Consolidate both locks into a single pub(crate) gpu_test_lock() in gpu.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
